brand.name: Nova Solutions Tech
brand.partnerLabel: EXCLUSIVE GLOBAL SALES & DISTRIBUTION PARTNER FOR PURIUM

headline: Cleaner air.
Proven technology.
Global access.
home.description: Explore PURIUM’s patented Smart Safeguards Gate, intelligent air-quality platform and product portfolio—available globally through Nova Solutions Tech.
home.technologyCopy: A precision-engineered air curtain helps prevent contaminants from moving deeper into a facility while supporting powerful circulation and filtration.
home.productsCopy: Compare walk-through gates, large-facility systems, compact indoor solutions and specialized disease-control configurations.

company.title: Nova Solutions Tech
company.summary: Nova Solutions Tech is PURIUM’s exclusive global sales and distribution partner, connecting its patented clean-air products and technologies with customers, integrators and regional partners worldwide.
paragraphs: Nova leads international product promotion, commercial development, sales coordination and distribution for PURIUM solutions. We help organizations identify the right system for their facility, region and operational requirements.

Our role is to make PURIUM technology accessible beyond the manufacturer’s home market. Nova coordinates product consultation, proposals, market partnerships, delivery planning and long-term customer support through a single global point of contact.
From public facilities and healthcare environments to education, transportation and commercial spaces, Nova works with customers to translate PURIUM’s proven technology into practical deployments.

contact.intro: Tell us about your facility, market or partnership opportunity. Every commercial, product and service inquiry is handled by Nova Solutions Tech.

/about/company.title: Nova Solutions Tech
headings: Connecting PURIUM innovation with the world.
Nova Solutions Tech is PURIUM’s exclusive global sales and distribution partner.
paragraphs: Nova Solutions Tech is PURIUM’s exclusive global sales and distribution partner, connecting its patented clean-air products and technologies with customers, integrators and regional partners worldwide.

Nova leads international product promotion, commercial development, sales coordination and distribution for PURIUM solutions. We help organizations identify the right system for their facility, region and operational requirements.

Our role is to make PURIUM technology accessible beyond the manufacturer’s home market. Nova coordinates product consultation, proposals, market partnerships, delivery planning and long-term customer support through a single global point of contact.

/about/vision.title: Vision
headings: Cleaner spaces. Smarter protection. Responsible growth.
paragraphs: Our shared vision is to make advanced clean-air technology easier to understand, access and deploy in the environments that need it.
Create safer indoor environments by helping reduce fine and ultrafine particulate matter where people live, work, learn and receive care.
Keep improving performance, developing intellectual property and translating strong engineering into dependable products.
Build long-term value through responsible collaboration, reliable customer support and a healthier environment for everyone involved.

/contact/purchase.title: Product & Sales Inquiry
headings: Talk with Nova’s global product team
paragraphs: All PURIUM product, proposal and distribution inquiries are handled by Nova Solutions Tech.

/contact/service.title: Service & Technical Support
paragraphs: Send product, installation and after-sales questions directly to Nova Solutions Tech.

/privacy.title: Privacy Policy
paragraphs: Nova Solutions Tech uses information submitted through this website only to respond to product, distribution, installation and support inquiries.

Inquiry information may include your name, organization, business contact details, region and message. Nova limits access to personnel and service partners who need the information to respond to your request.
To request access, correction or deletion of inquiry information, use Nova’s secure contact portal and select Privacy request.
